name: 6th Lord Mahadasha/Antardasha — Disease Onset Window
description: The major or sub-period of the 6th house lord opens a broad window for disease manifestation, health challenges, and encounters with illness.

source_text.quote: In the Dasa of the lord of Randhr, there will be danger from poison, fire, foes, and weapons... diseases of a serious nature.

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 6th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: The 6th house lord's period activates the house of disease, enemies, and obstacles. Its Dasha/Bhukti creates vulnerability to illness, infections, and health challenges requiring medical attention.

metadata.notes: Fundamental medical timing rule. The 6th house is the primary house of disease in Jyotish.

name: 8th Lord Dasha — Surgery & Sudden Health Crisis
description: The period of the 8th house lord triggers sudden health crises, surgical interventions, chronic disease flare-ups, and life-threatening medical events.

source_text.quote: In the Dasa of the 8th lord there will be fear from enemies, danger from the government, and disease... surgical operations and chronic suffering.

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 8th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: The 8th house lord's period activates the house of surgery, chronic ailments, sudden transformation, and death-like experiences. It is the primary indicator for surgical intervention and emergency medical events.

metadata.notes: The 8th house is the house of surgery (shastra-karma) and sudden transformation. Most reliable dasha indicator for surgical events.

name: 2nd Lord (Maraka) Dasha — Life-Threatening Health Danger
description: The 2nd lord as a Maraka (death-inflicting) planet's period creates serious health dangers that can be life-threatening, particularly when combined with other malefic indicators.

source_text.quote: The lords of the 2nd and 7th are Marakas (death-inflicting planets). Their Dasas bring danger to life and severe health afflictions.

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 2nd Lord (Maraka) is active
any_of: The 2nd Lord is a natural malefic
The 2nd Lord is afflicted by malefic aspects
The 2nd Lord is placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house

interpretation.meaning: The 2nd lord as Maraka activates death-inflicting energy. Its period brings serious health dangers including critical illness, hospitalization, and life-threatening conditions requiring emergency intervention.

metadata.notes: Maraka periods are classically the most dangerous for health. The 2nd lord is a primary Maraka.

name: 7th Lord (Maraka) Dasha — Critical Medical Emergency
description: The 7th lord as the second Maraka planet's period triggers critical medical emergencies, particularly when afflicted or connected to the 8th house.

source_text.quote: The 7th lord being a Maraka brings death or death-like suffering in its period... severe diseases afflicting the body.

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 7th Lord (Maraka) is active
any_of: The 7th Lord is a natural malefic
The 7th Lord is conjunct or aspected by the 8th lord
The 7th Lord is placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house

interpretation.meaning: The 7th lord as Maraka brings death-like suffering and critical medical emergencies. Its period can trigger major surgeries, near-death experiences, and hospitalization for life-threatening conditions.

metadata.notes: The 7th lord is the second Maraka. Combined with 8th house connection, it becomes extremely dangerous for health.

name: Mars-Ketu Dasha Combination — Surgical Intervention
description: Mars (surgery, cuts, blood) combined with Ketu (sudden, mysterious, surgical) in Dasha-Antardasha creates the most specific indicator for surgical operations.

source_text.quote: In the Antardasa of Ketu in Mars Dasa, there will be wounds from weapons, danger from fire, and surgical operations... blood-related diseases.

all_of: Mars Mahadasha is active AND Ketu Antardasha is active, OR Ketu Mahadasha is active AND Mars Antardasha is active

interpretation.meaning: Mars (the planet of surgery, cuts, and blood) combined with Ketu (sudden intervention, mysterious ailments, detachment from body) creates the single strongest Dasha indicator for surgical operations and invasive medical procedures.

metadata.notes: Mars-Ketu is the classical surgical combination. Mars cuts, Ketu detaches. Together they signify the knife (shastra).

name: Saturn Mahadasha — Chronic Disease & Wasting Illness
description: Saturn's major period activates chronic, long-duration diseases including wasting illnesses, joint problems, bone disorders, and conditions requiring prolonged treatment.

source_text.quote: During Saturn's Dasa, there will be diseases of a chronic nature, pain in joints and bones, wasting diseases, and suffering from cold-related ailments.

any_of: Saturn is placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house natally
Saturn is debilitated or in enemy sign
Saturn is aspected by Mars or Rahu

interpretation.meaning: Saturn's Mahadasha activates chronic, slow-developing health conditions. Diseases manifest gradually but persist long, often involving bones, joints, nerves, and conditions requiring sustained medical management.

metadata.notes: Saturn's diseases are slow, chronic, and debilitating. They rarely appear suddenly but persist for extended periods.

name: 12th Lord Dasha — Hospitalization & Confinement
description: The period of the 12th house lord triggers hospitalization, bed-ridden states, confinement in medical facilities, and isolation due to illness.

source_text.quote: In the Dasa of the 12th lord, there will be expenditure on account of diseases, confinement, and loss of vitality... hospitalization and bed-rest.

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 12th Lord is active
any_of: The 12th Lord is connected to 6th or 8th house
The 12th Lord is a natural malefic
The 12th Lord is afflicted

interpretation.meaning: The 12th lord's period activates the house of hospitalization, confinement, and expenditure on medical treatment. It specifically indicates admission to medical facilities, extended bed rest, and isolation for recovery.

metadata.notes: The 12th house specifically rules hospitals, asylums, and places of confinement. Its lord's period activates these significations.

name: Rahu Dasha — Mysterious & Difficult-to-Diagnose Illness
description: Rahu's period brings mysterious, unusual, and difficult-to-diagnose illnesses including poisoning, allergic reactions, and diseases with unclear etiology.

source_text.quote: During Rahu Dasa there will be danger from poison, serpents, and diseases that are difficult to diagnose... ailments of mysterious origin.

all_of: Rahu Mahadasha or Antardasha is active
any_of: Rahu is conjunct or aspecting the 6th lord
Rahu is placed in 6th or 8th house
Rahu is conjunct Mars or Saturn

interpretation.meaning: Rahu's period brings illnesses that confound doctors — unusual symptoms, misdiagnoses, allergic reactions, toxin-related conditions, and diseases with no clear cause. Treatment often requires unconventional approaches.

metadata.notes: Rahu diseases are characterized by confusion in diagnosis, unusual presentations, and need for multiple medical opinions.

name: Sun Dasha (Afflicted) — Heart & Vitality Crisis
description: An afflicted Sun's period brings cardiac issues, vitality depletion, bone/spine problems, and crises related to the core life-force.

source_text.quote: When the Sun is afflicted in its Dasa, there will be diseases of the heart, loss of vitality, bone disorders, and danger to the eyes.

all_of: Sun Mahadasha or Antardasha is active
any_of: Sun is debilitated (in Libra)
Sun is combust or in Rahu/Ketu axis
Sun is placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house
Sun is aspected by Saturn or Mars without benefic aspect

interpretation.meaning: The Sun represents core vitality (prana), heart, bones, and eyes. When afflicted during its Dasha, it triggers cardiac events, severe vitality depletion, spinal/bone issues, and eye disorders requiring medical intervention.

metadata.notes: Sun is Atmakaraka — its affliction directly impacts life-force. Cardiac events are the most serious manifestation.

name: Moon Dasha (Afflicted) — Mental Health & Psychosomatic Crisis
description: An afflicted Moon's period triggers mental health crises, psychosomatic illnesses, hormonal disorders, and fluid-related diseases.

source_text.quote: When the Moon is weak and afflicted in its Dasa, there will be mental disturbances, diseases of the blood and fluids, and suffering from waterborne ailments.

all_of: Moon Mahadasha or Antardasha is active
any_of: Moon is debilitated (in Scorpio)
Moon is in Papakartari Yoga (hemmed by malefics)
Moon is conjunct Rahu or Ketu
Moon is aspected by Saturn without benefic relief
Moon is in Krishna Paksha (dark half) and weak

interpretation.meaning: The Moon governs mind, emotions, fluids, and hormones. When afflicted during its period, it triggers depression, anxiety, psychosomatic illness, hormonal imbalances, and fluid-retention disorders requiring psychiatric or endocrine intervention.

metadata.notes: Moon affliction in Dasha is the primary indicator for psychiatric events and psychosomatic illness in Jyotish.
